phrases.text_local: Desculpe, onde fica a ponte pedonal?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH POHNG-tih peh-doo-NAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The footbridge connects the two platforms, essential for crossing tracks.

likely_response.translation_en: At the end, on the left.

responses.english: At the end, on the left.

phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, OHNG-dih EH AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh OOM?
phrases.cultural_note: Platform 1 is usually for trains toward Faro; platform signage is clear.

likely_response.translation_en: On the right, after the footbridge.

responses.english: On the right, after the footbridge.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the CP ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente a bilheteira da CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH seh-PEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff prioritize direct location cues over descriptive details.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Bilheteira CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the CP ticket office.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the CP ticket office.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh seh-PEH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Bilheteira CP.
